A '''battle''' occurred between forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] led by [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Xiaan Amersu]], and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Battle-stub}}

==The battle==
[[Xiaan Amersu]] led her [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] into battle for the first time, and while details of the battle are unknown, Amersu later took part in the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]'' {{1stm}}
